violations.text: The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Vomit and diarrhea hand out provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen did not having running water during time of inspection. Water was shut off. Corrective Action - Water was turned back on during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrective Action - Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to clean and sanitize ice machine. Establishment is to send photos of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH CFP before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Beef was observed held at 115 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Beef was placed in hot hold unit before hot hold unit had been fully heated. Beef was placed in unit 1 hr prior to inspection. Beef was reheated to 180 DF on stove top. Establishment is to ensure hot hold unit is fully heated before placing items in the unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Sliced turkey breast was observed without a date of preparation. Date of preparation could not be identified. Turkey was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

ROP Swordfish was observed thawing in an intact package. ROP fish products must be fully removed from package before thawing. ROP Swordfish was 41DF. ROP swordfish was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrective Action - Ice scoop was run through dishwasher, placed on cleaned and sanitized food contact surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. Establishment is to purchase thermo labels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026
The cold water faucet knob on the hand sink by the cooking line is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2026
The floor throughout the kitchen and walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back entrance to the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2026
The door exit device located on the back kitchen entrance door is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Raw animal foods (Beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was cleaned during time of inspection. Ice from ice machine was voluntarily disposed of. Professional service call placed for ice machine during time of inspection. Establishment is to send photos of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH before resuming use of machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Food items prepared in the establishment was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
The dishwasher located in the bar area was not in good repair. Service call placed during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
A leak was observed at the dump sink draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2026
Warmer door gaskets was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026
